name: Planetree International Development Limited
summary: Planetree International Development Limited, an investment holding company, engages in treasury management, financial, and money lending businesses in Hong Kong. The company is involved in trading and holding debt and equity securities; financing and securities investment activities; property leasing; dealing in futures contracts; and securities investment activities. It also offers corporate management services; securities brokerage and financial services; and asset management services. The company was formerly known as Yugang International Limited and changed its name to Planetree International Development Limited in July 2019. Planetree International Development Limited is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
